errors.mongodbConfigRequired: MongoDBQueueAdapter requires either connection config or client instance.
errors.mongodbNotConnected: MongoDB client is not connected. Call connect() first.
errors.redisConfigRequired: RedisQueueAdapter requires either connection config or client instance.
errors.redisNotConnected: Redis client is not connected. Call connect() first.
errors.rabbitmqConfigRequired: RabbitMQQueueAdapter requires either connection config or connectionObject instance.
errors.rabbitmqNotConnected: RabbitMQ connection is not established. Call connect() first.
errors.memcachedConfigRequired: MemcachedQueueAdapter requires either connection config or client instance.
errors.memcachedNotConnected: Memcached client is not connected. Call connect() first.
